calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets (Heggstad Petition)
Off Calendar Jun-08-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Lisa Laws Kohil appearing via zoom for Roderick Llwellyn (petitioner).

The Court advised Ms. Kohil to refer to the tentative ruling on the IRA. Ms. Kohlil stated the brokerage account needs to be confirmed. Petition for order conforming trust assets is taken under submission with the intent to grant Schwab brokerage account. The Court denies without prejudice the Schwab Roth IRA as asset of the trust. The Court denies without prejudice request to confirm any discovered assets and require a new 850 petition.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Brown. Not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets (Heggstad Petition)
Off Calendar Apr-18-2023 Continued To Jun-06-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
